languages.text: "Так отомстите: обещаю, я найду момент, когда для Ювенны это будет особенно болезненно".

traits.locale_text: "Так отомстите: обещаю, я найду момент, когда для Ювенны это будет особенно болезненно".

languages.text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."
languages.original_text: "Так отомстите: обещаю, я найду момент, когда для Ювенны это будет особенно болезненно".

traits.locale_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."
"So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."
"So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

languages.text: “那就去复仇吧。我保证，我会挑个让尤文娜最痛彻心扉的时刻。”
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: “那就去复仇吧。我保证，我会挑个让尤文娜最痛彻心扉的时刻。”

languages.text: « Vengez-vous, alors. Je vous promets de trouver un moment qui sera particulièrement douloureux pour Juvenna. »
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: « Vengez-vous, alors. Je vous promets de trouver un moment qui sera particulièrement douloureux pour Juvenna. »

languages.text: "O hâlde intikamını al... Söz veriyorum, Juvenna için özellikle acı verici olan bir an gelecek."
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "O hâlde intikamını al... Söz veriyorum, Juvenna için özellikle acı verici olan bir an gelecek."

languages.text: «Pues vénguese. Le prometo que encontraré un momento especialmente doloroso para Juvenna».
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: «Pues vénguese. Le prometo que encontraré un momento especialmente doloroso para Juvenna».

languages.text: "Dann rächt Euch. Ich verspreche, ich werden einen Moment finden, der für Juvenna besonders schmerzhaft ist."
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: "Dann rächt Euch. Ich verspreche, ich werden einen Moment finden, der für Juvenna besonders schmerzhaft ist."

languages.text: 「だから、復讐をどうぞ。私はジュヴェナにとって特に痛ましい瞬間を見つけることを約束します」
languages.original_text: "So take your revenge: I promise I will find a moment that will be especially painful for Juvenna."

traits.locale_text: 「だから、復讐をどうぞ。私はジュヴェナにとって特に痛ましい瞬間を見つけることを約束します」
